title: L'Agence de la Sécurité des Systèmes d'Information du Ministère de la Défense Nationale diffuse la stratégie nationale de sécurité des systèmes d'information 2025-2029
description: Official Algerian Ministry of National Defence (ASSI) announcement of the 2025-2029 National Information Systems Security Strategy. Domestic institutional source, but reporting indicates the strategy does NOT explicitly name post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography; pillars are technical capability, inter-institutional coordination, and cyber-crisis management.

title: Le contenu de la Stratégie nationale de la sécurité des systèmes d'information 2025-2029 dévoilé
description: Algérie Presse Service (state news agency) coverage of the 2025-2029 national cybersecurity strategy. Journalism source; no explicit post-quantum cryptography reference.

title: الجزائر انخرطت في مسار استراتيجية سيادية في مجال الأمن السيبراني
description: APS (state news agency) Arabic-language piece on Algeria's sovereign cybersecurity strategy. Journalism; general cybersecurity, no PQC mention.

title: Moyens de cryptographie - ARPCE
description: ARPCE (Authority for Regulation of Post and Electronic Communications) page on authorisation of cryptographic means. Domestic regulator, but concerns classical cryptography licensing/key deposit; no post-quantum / quantum-safe reference.

title: Certification Electronique Sécurité de l'Information - ARPCE (Alger)
description: ARPCE document on electronic certification and information security (dated 2009). Domestic regulator source; no post-quantum cryptography content.

title: Services du Premier Ministre | Renforcement de la Sécurité et de la Défense Nationale
description: Algerian Prime Minister's services page on national security and defence reinforcement. Domestic government source; no explicit post-quantum cryptography reference.

title: Catalogue des normes algériennes au 31 décembre 2023 (CTN-04)
description: IANOR (Algerian standardisation institute) standards catalogue extract. Domestic standards body, but the catalogue section concerns individual/collective protection; no post-quantum cryptography standard.

title: Cybersécurité : l'Algérie adopte sa stratégie nationale 2025 2029
description: We Are Tech (Africa tech journalism) report on Algeria's 2025-2029 cybersecurity strategy. Journalism; no PQC reference.

title: Algérie : une stratégie nationale 2025-2029 pour sécuriser les systèmes d'information
description: Digital Business Africa coverage of the national strategy. Journalism; no PQC reference.

title: L'Algérie publie officiellement sa première Stratégie Nationale de Sécurité des Systèmes d'Information
description: Africa Cybersecurity Mag report on the first Algerian national information-systems security strategy. Journalism; no PQC reference.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography: 2026 Government Deadlines (Algeria-focused)
description: AlgeriaTech.news blog/journalism piece discussing PQC migration mandates and Algeria's posture (procurement-driven, crypto-agility). Explicitly mentions PQC but is journalism/blog, NOT an institutional source - excluded.
